vision_report.narrative_description: As a botanical observer, I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. The registry provided (P1-P4) does not match the physical reality of the desk. All pots are currently empty of living plant matter. The soil appears dark and potentially over-saturated, but there is no biological growth. The white rabbit anchor in P3 is the only consistent feature. The biome is currently in a state of total systemic loss.
